title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF TRINIDAD, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO JOSE ABAD SANTOS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 668 / 51 OG No. 4, 1795 (April, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1206, April 20, 1955 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF TRINIDAD, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO JOSE ABAD SANTOS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Trinidad, Province of Davao, is changed to Jose Abad Santos.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 20, 1955.
